We power customer conversations for 40% of Shopify brands
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Customer stories
Our customers say it best
Every conversation is a revenue opportunity. Here's the proof.
19.2x
ROI on AI-driven sales interactions
56%
automation rate in <2 months
10%
reduction in total cost of ownership
$500M+
revenue driven through conversations
17,000+
ecommerce brands powered globally
4.2x
average return on investment
Get to know Gorgias
Built for brands that know every conversation counts.
Automate routine tickets and personalize the rest.
AI Agent trained on your brand
One conversation. Everywhere.
One unified inbox across every channel, with live Shopify data and full customer context built into every conversation.
High-quality answers. Measurable results.
Engage. Guide. Convert.
8.83× ROI
“The AI upsells with a conversational tone that feels genuinely helpful, not pushy. It asks the right follow-up questions and improves AOV. It’s exactly how we train our human agents.”
AI Agent + Helpdesk
AI Agent + Helpdesk, built as one.
Most brands bolt third-party AI onto a generic helpdesk. Gorgias unifies AI and the inbox in a single platform, so agents and automation share context, resulting in faster, more accurate responses.
Explore the platform
One AI Agent. Pre-sale to post-sale.
Learn more
->
Pre-trained on 1B+ conversations
Understands ecommerce, Shopify data, and customer intent from day one
Your rules. Your AI.
Apply your tone, policies, and SOPs with built-in guardrails
Automate 60% of support
Resolve inquiries automatically so your team can focus on high-impact work
AI coaching, built in
Proactive, real-time tips help agents improve with every conversation
Proactive, not reactive AI
Engage shoppers at the right moment with the right recommendations
Knows when to escalate to your team
Seamless hand-offs to human agents with context
One inbox. Full store context.
Learn more
->
One omnichannel inbox
Email, chat, SMS, WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook in one view
In-conversation actions
Cancel, discount, or upsell directly inside the conversation
Native Shopify integration
Pull up any order, customer, or product without leaving the ticket
300+ integrations
Recharge, Klaviyo, Yotpo, and more connected out of the box
Team collaboration
Route, assign, and manage tickets across your team
Revenue attribution reporting
See exactly how much revenue your support team generates
50 in 50 program
We help you get to 50% in 50 days.
Today
Connect your channels
Connect your channels, migrate your data, and get your team up and running with implementation resources that guide the way.
Day 7
Launch in 1 week
Start resolving tickets immediately with full Shopify context, knowledge, and workflows in place.
Day 21
Automate at scale
AI Agent handles the repetitive tickets filling up the queue, so your team can spend their time where it matters most.
Day 50
Drive measurable revenue
Turn high-intent moments into measurable revenue by engaging shoppers, increasing basket size, and giving each visitor the confidence to convert.
"When we first started with Gorgias, our goal was to hit 30% automation in 30 days. We surpassed that and are now above 50% automation, and we’re still climbing."
Courtney Bajek
Customer Service Lead at Orthofeet
Read the full story
->
Backed by the best
The most trusted names in AI and ecommerce choose Gorgias. Now you can too.
OpenAI Partner
Built on a direct OpenAI partnership. Deeper model access. AI fine-tuned for product recommendations, order management, and brand voice. A real integration.
Built into Shopify’s DNA
Shopify-invested. Orders, customers, and store data live inside Gorgias natively. One click to install. Zero data syncing.
Platform stability
Zero downtime during peak season. Handles high volumes and holiday surges without dropping a single conversation.
Continuous innovation
Commerce-first development. Every feature based on how Shopify brands actually work.
Deepest integrations
300+ integrations. Klaviyo, Recharge, Yotpo, and your entire stack. One click.
Protected investment
Scales with you. From 100 tickets a month to 100,000. Same platform.
Get started today
Sign up free
Book a demo
Protect your team from BFCM burnout
OSEA, a Gorgias customer known for iconic body care and standout CX, has a gift waiting for you.
Claim your gift card
Looking for other resources?
Explore webinars, help articles, and community insights to go even deeper.
Explore more resources
Win
more
customers with
better
conversations
Download the report
Book a demo
Start driving revenue from every conversation
Try it for free

changelog.title: Gorgias Updates
changelog.text:
Gorgias Updates
Gorgias Updates
www.gorgias.com
Subscribe to updates
All Publications
Announcement
Bug fix
Improvement
New feature
Developers
Convert
AI Agent
5 days ago
Gorgias MCP is now in Open Beta 🎉
by Matilda Lee
Connect Gorgias to the AI tools your team is already using. Surface Voice of Customer insights, audit your helpdesk setup, and review AI Agent performance right from chat. Gorgias MCP is in open beta today, a first-party server that plugs
Announcement
11 days ago
Export ticket message content from reporting drill-downs
by Aoife Mornard
Announcement
Improvement
What's new: You can now export up to 1 month of ticket message bodies directly from your reporting drill-downs.. Previously, getting the message content out of Gorgias meant either pulling it through the API or filing a support request for
12 days ago
🎯 SLA Policies: Now with Tags & Ticket Field Filtering
by Marko Vranic
What's New                             SLA policies can now be configured using tags and ticket field values. This gives you granular control over which SLA applies to which tickets. Previously, you could only say "email tickets get a
Announcement
25 days ago
Helpdesk 2.0 is live 🚀
by Lauren Di Nardo, Product Marketing Manager
Announcement
Improvement
Helpdesk 2.0 is now available. The workspace is rebuilt to surface customer context, orders, and AI activity right where agents need them. What's new Customer timeline, redesigned Past conversations now live in a dedicated timeline next
27 days ago
Cleaner queues when AI Agent hands over a chat without an email
by Emmanuel Breard
This update is for AI Agent customers using Chat with email capture set to required. What's New If you're using AI Agent on Chat with email capture set to required, the handover behavior is now smarter when a shopper hasn't shared their
Announcement
AI Agent
Improvement
about 2 months ago
Shopping Assistant now reads product images to find better matches
by Emmanuel Breard
Shopping Assistant now analyzes product images to improve its recommendations. It uses an AI-generated description of each product's main image as an additional signal when finding the best match for a customer's request.
Announcement
New feature
AI Agent
2 months ago
OAuth2 Authentication for HTTP Integrations
by Mehdi Dellagi, Software Engineer
Announcement
HTTP integrations now support OAuth2 (Client Credentials). Tokens are obtained and refreshed automatically so your integrations never break. Why this matters for Shopify users Shopify is moving to OAuth2 and has been deprecating static
3 months ago
📚 Control which help center articles your AI Agent uses — independently from article visibility
by Felipe Mora
You can now enable or disable help center articles for your AI Agent directly from the Knowledge page, without changing whether the article is visible to customers on your help center. Nothing changes by default — all your existing
AI Agent
Improvement
3 months ago
Power Up Your Instagram Workflows with Profile-Driven Rule Conditions
by Divyam Rai
You can now extend your Gorgias Rules using attributes from a customer’s Instagram profile — across all Instagram channels, including DMs, comments, ad comments, and mentions. With these new conditions, you can filter and automate based on
Announcement
New feature
Newer
Older

analysis.name: Gorgias
analysis.tagline: Conversations that drive revenue, not just resolutions.
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-powered helpdesk and autonomous AI agent built exclusively for ecommerce brands to automate support and drive sales from one unified inbox.
analysis.ideal_customer: DTC and ecommerce brands (especially Shopify merchants) that need to automate routine customer support while converting shoppers into buyers

features.name: ai agent
features.description: Autonomous AI that handles inquiries, processes orders, and drives sales 24/7 without human involvement
features.evidence_quote: Sell, support, engage customers 24/7

features.name: shopping assistant
features.description: AI-powered shopping guide that recommends products and guides shoppers toward purchase
features.evidence_quote: Engage shoppers like your best rep

features.name: support agent
features.description: AI-augmented human agent tooling resolving 60% of inquiries instantly
features.evidence_quote: 60% of inquiries resolved instantly

features.name: omnichannel inbox
features.description: Unified inbox for email, live chat, SMS, WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and voice
features.evidence_quote: Email, Live chat, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok media, WhatsApp, SMS & Voice (add-ons)

features.name: shopify integration
features.description: Native integration pulling order, customer, and product data directly into every ticket
features.evidence_quote: Pull up any order, customer, or product without leaving the ticket

features.evidence_quote: Connect your BigCommerce store to Gorgias to support shoppers instantly with customers' order history

differentiators: AI Agent and Helpdesk built as one unified platform — not third-party AI bolted onto a generic helpdesk
Pre-trained on 1B+ ecommerce conversations for out-of-the-box ecommerce intent accuracy
Pricing based on ticket/conversation volume, not seats — unlimited users on all plans
In-conversation order actions (cancel, discount, upsell) without leaving the ticket
$500M+ in revenue attributed to AI-driven conversations across customer base
19.2x ROI on AI-driven sales interactions (customer metric)
First-party MCP server for connecting to external AI tools and surfacing VoC data

recent_ships.what: SLA Policies extended with tag and ticket field filtering for granular per-ticket SLA control
recent_ships.source: SLA policies can now be configured using tags and ticket field values

recent_ships.what: Helpdesk 2.0 launched — rebuilt workspace surfacing customer context, orders, and AI activity with redesigned customer timeline
recent_ships.source: Helpdesk 2.0 is now available. The workspace is rebuilt to surface customer context, orders, and AI activity

recent_ships.what: Smarter AI Agent chat handover behavior when shopper hasn't provided email at required capture
recent_ships.source: If you're using AI Agent on Chat with email capture set to required, the handover behavior is now smarter

recent_ships.what: Shopping Assistant now reads product images to generate AI descriptions used as recommendation matching signals
recent_ships.source: Shopping Assistant now analyzes product images to improve its recommendations

recent_ships.what: OAuth2 Client Credentials authentication for HTTP integrations with automatic token refresh
recent_ships.source: HTTP integrations now support OAuth2 (Client Credentials). Tokens are obtained and refreshed automatically

recent_ships.what: Independent AI Agent article control — toggle articles for AI use without affecting customer-facing help center visibility
recent_ships.source: enable or disable help center articles for your AI Agent directly from the Knowledge page

recent_ships.what: Instagram profile-driven rule conditions across DMs, comments, ad comments, and mentions
recent_ships.source: extend your Gorgias Rules using attributes from a customer's Instagram profile

praised: Deep Shopify integration with in-ticket order actions praised as core differentiator
'The AI upsells with a conversational tone that feels genuinely helpful, not pushy. It asks the right follow-up questions and improves AOV.' (landing page testimonial)
56% automation rate achieved in under 2 months (customer data point on landing)
19.2x ROI on AI-driven sales interactions (customer metric on landing)

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50 tickets/mo; $0.40/overage ticket; omnichannel; SSO; unlimited users; no AI Agent

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: 300 tickets/mo; $40/100 overage tickets; AI Agent at $0.90/resolution; 60 AI interactions included

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2,000 tickets/mo; $1.50/overage AI interaction; full platform with AI Agent; recommended tier

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5,000 tickets/mo; full platform with AI Agent; advanced reporting and controls

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom ticket volume; tailored for largest Shopify brands; dedicated support

pricing.notes: Pricing is ticket/conversation-volume-based, not seat-based — unlimited users on all plans. AI Agent interactions are priced separately per resolved conversation ($0.90 on Basic, $1.00 rate shown at Starter level) with included bundles that increase per tier. AI Agent not available on Starter. Voice and SMS are add-ons. Yearly billing includes 2 months free (~16% off). Overage for helpdesk tickets: $0.40/ticket (Starter), $40/100 tickets (Basic+). Overage for AI Agent interactions: $1.50/interaction (Pro). AI Agent available on Email and Chat channels only.
